positive: A mystical woodland creature, combining elements of a fox and a deer, resting gracefully within a lush, stylized forest clearing. The creature has vibrant, autumnal fur colors—burnt orange, deep crimson, and gold—and large, inquisitive, luminous eyes. It is framed by delicate, highly stylized bioluminescent flora and intertwining vine motifs. The overall aesthetic is a maximalist yet balanced composition with strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast. Use a watercolor and engraved ink style, giving it an aged, illuminated manuscript feel. Composition must be centered and symmetrical, ideal for a t-shirt print. Cinematic golden hour lighting, volumetric light shafts highlighting the fur and foliage, deep emerald and slate blue background contrasting the warm subject. Highly detailed, flat vector elements mixed with photorealistic texture.
negative: low quality, poorly drawn, blurry, bokeh, artifacts, cropped, text, watermark, signature, disfigured, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, messy, dirty, realistic photography, 3d rendering
